q.en: What did Nikola Tesla discover that changed the world?
q.zh: 尼古拉·特斯拉发现了什么，从而改变了世界？

options.en: The lightbulb according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 灯泡（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says Tesla's discovery, 'alternating current (AC), changed the world. It would go on to power modern industry and light up nations.'
explain.zh: 书中说特斯拉的发现“交流电（AC）改变了世界。它后来为现代工业供电，并点亮了各国。”

q.en: In what year was Nikola Tesla born?
q.zh: 尼古拉·特斯拉出生于哪一年？

options.en: 1884 according to some versions of the story

explain.en: The book states, 'Tesla was born during a lightning storm in 1856 in Eastern Europe.'
explain.zh: 书中说：“特斯拉于1856年在一场雷暴中出生在东欧。”

options.en: A current that moves in one direction as a straight line
options.zh: 沿直线朝一个方向流动的电流

options.en: A current that moves back and forth sixty times a second according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 每秒来回流动六十次的电流（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book defines direct current: 'Direct current moves in one direction as a straight line and is difficult to send over long distances.'
explain.zh: 书中定义直流电：“直流电沿直线朝一个方向流动，难以远距离输送。”

options.en: A type of lightbulb according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一种灯泡（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A machine that turns motion into electricity
options.zh: 把运动转化为电能的机器

explain.en: The glossary defines generator as 'a machine that turns motion into electricity.'
explain.zh: 词汇表将generator（发电机）定义为“把运动转化为电能的机器”。

q.en: How is alternating current (AC) better than direct current (DC) for sending power?
q.zh: 就输送电力而言，交流电（AC）比直流电（DC）好在哪里？

options.en: AC is easier to send long distances without losing much energy
options.zh: 交流电更容易远距离输送，且损耗不大

options.en: DC is easier to send long distances according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 直流电更容易远距离输送（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says AC 'can easily be changed to lower and higher voltages and be sent over long distances without losing a lot of energy,' unlike DC.
explain.zh: 书中说交流电“可以轻易转为更高或更低的电压，并能远距离输送而损耗不大”，这一点不同于直流电。

q.en: What is the author's main purpose in this book?
q.zh: 作者写这本书的主要目的是什么？

options.en: To tell the life story of Nikola Tesla and his inventions
options.zh: 讲述尼古拉·特斯拉的生平及其发明

options.en: To teach how to build a radio according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 教人如何造收音机（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book follows Tesla's life from his birth through his inventions and death, showing its purpose is to tell his life story.
explain.zh: 书中从特斯拉的出生写到他的发明和去世，说明其目的是讲述他的生平。

q.en: Who bought the rights to use Tesla's AC inventions?
q.zh: 谁买下了使用特斯拉交流电发明的权利？

options.en: Guglielmo Marconi according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 古列尔莫·马可尼（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: George Westinghouse 'bought the rights to use Tesla's inventions for $60,000' plus part ownership in his company.
explain.zh: 乔治·威斯汀豪斯“以6万美元买下使用特斯拉发明的权利”，并让特斯拉持有公司部分股权。

q.en: Why did Tesla tear up his contract with Westinghouse?
q.zh: 特斯拉为什么撕毁了与威斯汀豪斯的合同？

options.en: To save the company, which had nearly run out of money
options.zh: 为了挽救几乎没钱的公司

options.en: The contract was fake according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 合同是假的（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Westinghouse's company 'had almost run out of money... To save the company, Tesla tore up the contract he had signed with Westinghouse.'
explain.zh: 威斯汀豪斯的公司“几乎没钱了……为了挽救公司，特斯拉撕毁了他与威斯汀豪斯签的合同。”

q.en: Who is called the "father of radio" by the U.S. government after Tesla's death?
q.zh: 特斯拉去世后，美国政府称谁为“无线电之父”？

explain.en: After Tesla died in 1943, 'the U.S. government finally decided that radio was Tesla's invention, calling him the "father of radio."'
explain.zh: 特斯拉1943年去世后，“美国政府最终认定无线电是特斯拉的发明，称他为‘无线电之父’。”

q.zh: 特斯拉在1898年展示了什么？

options.en: The first radio broadcast according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 第一次无线电广播（按书中另一种说法）
第一个机器人——一艘遥控船

explain.en: The timeline lists: '1898: Tesla demonstrates the first robot—a remote-controlled boat.'
explain.zh: 时间线列出：“1898年：特斯拉展示了第一个机器人——一艘遥控船。”

prompt.en: Imagine you could invent something that changes the world. Write a few sentences describing your invention and how it would help people.
prompt.zh: 想象你能发明一样改变世界的东西。写几句话，描述你的发明，以及它会如何帮助人们。

en: Explain how it would help people or change the world.
zh: 描述你的发明有什么用。
说明它会如何帮助人们或改变世界。
